summary: Completed testing of Theme and Branding features: SGCCI/SBC logos, dark/light theme toggle, admin logo upload. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Login page shows SGCCI logo (img[alt='SGCCI'])
Login page shows SBC logo (img[alt='SBC'])
Theme toggle button (sun/moon icon) visible on login page (data-testid='theme-toggle-btn')
Theme toggle switches between dark and light mode
Theme persists in localStorage (key: 'ssnc_theme')
Theme persists after page reload
Admin login works with admin@ssnc.com / admin123
Admin sidebar shows SBC logo
Admin sidebar has theme toggle button
Admin Settings page has 'App Logo' section
Admin Settings page has 'Upload Logo' button (data-testid='upload-logo-btn')
Hidden file input exists for logo upload (data-testid='logo-file-input')
Current uploaded logo displayed in settings
Admin dashboard displays correctly in dark mode
Admin dashboard displays correctly in light mode
User login works with phone=9000000001, password=9000000001
User header shows SBC logo
User header has theme toggle button
User dashboard displays correctly in dark mode
User dashboard displays correctly in light mode
Light mode has proper contrast (dark text rgb(29,32,48) on light bg rgb(246,247,249))
API /api/health returns 200 OK
API /api/public/branding returns app_logo and app_name
API /api/uploads/app_logo.png returns 200 (logo file accessible)
API /api/admin/upload-logo endpoint exists and requires auth
API /api/admin/settings returns settings including app_logo
context_for_next_testing_agent: Theme and branding features fully implemented. Dark theme is default, light theme available via toggle. Theme stored in localStorage key 'ssnc_theme'. SGCCI and SBC logos at /sgcci_logo.png and /sbc_logo.png in frontend/public. Admin can upload custom logo via Settings page - saved to /app/backend/uploads/ and served via /api/uploads/. Public branding endpoint at GET /api/public/branding (no auth). Primary color is SGCCI blue (#32329A / HSL 240 51% 40%).
